1st rowIt’s battery powered! Love love it! Works perfectly I don’t care what the negative comments are- nothing negative about it. Great for the purse or cosmetic bag. Travels great!
2nd rowGood stuff! Yes - it's weird to cover yourself with grey foam that smells like a campfire - but when you rinse it off, you're actually clean. No fragrance, no slime. Nice soap!
3rd rowI've had this for a little over a month now and I have NOTHING bad to say. Gives a close shave and is VERY QUIET !!!
4th rowLashes ere too short didn’t fit my eye
5th rowThe magnet doesn’t work is impossible to used. I not sure if i can return it
